libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native-image run tests on io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 under JDK 25, configure nativeTest runtime system properties: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true, ideally guarded for libraryVersion == '5.0.1'. Use loopback Vert.x HttpServer/WebClient tests; no external service, Docker image, or environment variable is required.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The public OAuth2WebClient API references optional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2; only add that dependency if intentionally testing OAuth2-specific behavior, not for baseline meaningful web-client coverage.
The native-run property requirement is tied to Netty 4.2.x on JDK 25/current native-image defaults; local Gradle and Native Image verification remain authoritative.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency or Docker service is needed for meaningful Vert.x Web Client coverage, but Vert.x 5.0.1 resolves Netty 4.2.2.Final and needs the same Java 25 native-run unsafe-access properties already used for Vert.x 5.0.0.
